attributes.title: [InfluxDB OTel] HTTP & Storage
attributes.description: HTTP API traffic, write/query throughput, storage health (WAL, cache, compaction), and writer metrics.

params.markdown:
## [InfluxDB OTel] HTTP & Storage

This dashboard focuses on the write path and storage:
- HTTP API requests by endpoint and status
- Write and query throughput (bytes, counts)
- WAL, cache, and TSM disk usage
- Compaction queue and duration
- Storage writer (points written, dropped, errors)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_write_request_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_write_request_count)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_write_request_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_write_request_count)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_query_request_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_query_request_count)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_query_request_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_query_request_count)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_wal_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS wal_bytes = MAX(storage_wal_size)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_wal_size IS NOT NULL
| STATS wal_bytes = MAX(storage_wal_size)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_cache_writes_dropped IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_dropped = MAX(storage_cache_writes_dropped)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_cache_writes_dropped IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_dropped = MAX(storage_cache_writes_dropped)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_compactions_queued IS NOT NULL
| STATS queued = MAX(storage_compactions_queued)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_compactions_queued IS NOT NULL
| STATS queued = MAX(storage_compactions_queued)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_shard_write_err_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_errs = MAX(storage_shard_write_err_count)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_shard_write_err_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_errs = MAX(storage_shard_write_err_count)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_write_request_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_write_request_count) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), endpoint
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_write_request_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(http_write_request_count) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), endpoint
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_write_request_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS bytes = MAX(http_write_request_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_write_request_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS bytes = MAX(http_write_request_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_query_response_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS bytes = MAX(http_query_response_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_query_response_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS bytes = MAX(http_query_response_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_wal_size IS NOT NULL OR storage_tsm_files_disk_bytes IS NOT NULL OR storage_cache_disk_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS wal = MAX(storage_wal_size), tsm = MAX(storage_tsm_files_disk_bytes), cache_disk = MAX(storage_cache_disk_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_wal_size IS NOT NULL OR storage_tsm_files_disk_bytes IS NOT NULL OR storage_cache_disk_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS wal = MAX(storage_wal_size), tsm = MAX(storage_tsm_files_disk_bytes), cache_disk = MAX(storage_cache_disk_bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_compactions_queued IS NOT NULL
| STATS queued = MAX(storage_compactions_queued) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), level
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_compactions_queued IS NOT NULL
| STATS queued = MAX(storage_compactions_queued) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), level
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_shard_write_sum IS NOT NULL OR storage_shard_write_dropped_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS written = MAX(storage_shard_write_sum), dropped = MAX(storage_shard_write_dropped_sum) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_shard_write_sum IS NOT NULL OR storage_shard_write_dropped_sum IS NOT NULL
| STATS written = MAX(storage_shard_write_sum), dropped = MAX(storage_shard_write_dropped_sum) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_write_request_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(http_write_request_count) BY status
| SORT total DESC
| LIMIT 8

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE http_write_request_count IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = MAX(http_write_request_count) BY status
| SORT total DESC
| LIMIT 8

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_wal_writes_err IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_errs = MAX(storage_wal_writes_err)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE storage_wal_writes_err IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_errs = MAX(storage_wal_writes_err)
